data.title: Golden Trump Bitcoin statue placed in DC by crypto supporters, symbolizing Trump's pro-crypto stance. Organized through Pump.fun, it serves as a marketing tie-in for a meme coin.
data.description: Crypto enthusiasts in Washington, D.C. recently made a bold statement by placing a golden statue of former president Donald Trump holding a Bitcoin on the National Mall. The foam-made statue was set up through Pump.fun livestreams by meme coin supporters as a nod to Trump's support of cryptocurrency and as a promotional tactic for a meme coin. Organizer Hichem Zaghdoudi emphasized that the statue symbolized the intersection of politics and financial technology. The unveiling of the statue was covered by ABC 7News DC. This event showcased the growing influence of cryptocurrency in mainstream conversations and the creative ways supporters are advocating for its adoption.

data.title: ¡VIVA! Spanish Audio Bible sees success in Miami: 368 characters brought to life by Latin talent at Crescent Moon Studios.
data.description: Faith Agency, LLC based in Miami has recently achieved a significant production milestone for ¡VIVA! The Spanish Audio Bible. This groundbreaking project features a cinematic portrayal of 368 biblical characters brought to life by top Latin talent, accompanied by grand symphonic scores and immersive 3D audio. To date, the recording sessions have been a success and the next round is scheduled for September 21–26, 2025, at Crescent Moon Studios in Miami. This studio, founded by the renowned Gloria and Emilio Estefan, has previously hosted acclaimed artists such as Marc Anthony and Sha.

data.title: EFFECT Photonics renames U.S. subsidiary to Arycs Technologies, focusing on coherent optical systems for networks.
data.description: Maynard, Massachusetts - In a significant development, EFFECT Photonics, BV has renamed its U.S. subsidiary as Arycs Technologies, indicating a push towards faster progress in product development and market strategies. The rebranding highlights the subsidiary’s improved market preparedness, cohesive leadership direction, and focused goal of providing energy-efficient coherent optical solutions for current networking issues. As a part of this rebranding, Roberto Marcoccia will assume a key role within the company.
